array.string:
cd /Users/apple/Desktop/GenTrust_Mobility_DE &&
# Wait for network sleep 10 &&
# Kill old processes killall -9 node npm vite expo 2>/dev/null || true && sleep 2 &&
# Start Monitor FIRST cd monitor && node server.js > /tmp/monitor.log 2>&1 & sleep 3 &&
# Start Backend API (includes all Telegram bots) cd /Users/apple/Desktop/GenTrust_Mobility_DE && npm run dev > /tmp/backend.log 2>&1 & sleep 5 &&
# Start Core Dashboards cd /Users/apple/Desktop/GenTrust_Mobility_DE/admin-panel && npm run dev > /tmp/admin-panel.log 2>&1 & cd /Users/apple/Desktop/GenTrust_Mobility_DE/city-hall-dashboard && npm run dev > /tmp/city-hall.log 2>&1 & cd /Users/apple/Desktop/GenTrust_Mobility_DE/staff-panel && npm run dev > /tmp/staff-panel.log 2>&1 & sleep 5 &&
# Start Department Dashboards cd /Users/apple/Desktop/GenTrust_Mobility_DE/departments/roads && npm run dev > /tmp/dept-roads.log 2>&1 & cd /Users/apple/Desktop/GenTrust_Mobility_DE/departments/lighting && npm run dev > /tmp/dept-lighting.log 2>&1 & cd /Users/apple/Desktop/GenTrust_Mobility_DE/departments/waste && npm run dev > /tmp/dept-waste.log 2>&1 & cd /Users/apple/Desktop/GenTrust_Mobility_DE/departments/parks && npm run dev > /tmp/dept-parks.log 2>&1 & cd /Users/apple/Desktop/GenTrust_Mobility_DE/departments/water && npm run dev > /tmp/dept-water.log 2>&1 & cd /Users/apple/Desktop/GenTrust_Mobility_DE/departments/transport && npm run dev > /tmp/dept-transport.log 2>&1 & cd /Users/apple/Desktop/GenTrust_Mobility_DE/departments/ecology && npm run dev > /tmp/dept-ecology.log 2>&1 & cd /Users/apple/Desktop/GenTrust_Mobility_DE/departments/vandalism && npm run dev > /tmp/dept-vandalism.log 2>&1 & sleep 5 &&
# Start Mobile Apps (Expo) cd /Users/apple/Desktop/GenTrust_Mobility_DE/mobile-school && npx expo start --port 8082 --lan > /tmp/expo-school.log 2>&1 & cd /Users/apple/Desktop/GenTrust_Mobility_DE/mobile-parent && npx expo start --port 8083 --lan > /tmp/expo-parent.log 2>&1 &
echo "✅ GenTrust Mobility Auto-Start Complete" >> /tmp/gentrust-autostart.log
